sources.overlap_strategy: Archive the current API table by source report date and merge without replacing previously committed dates.
sources.schedule_rationale: 12:30 and 20:30 Beijing time provide a post-publication capture and a same-day fallback for the current-only table.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit requires the recorded MWR source terms and redistribution assessment.

sources.overlap_strategy: Merge all recent source observations by reservoir and source date on every run.
sources.schedule_rationale: 08:30 IST captures settled prior-day values; 17:30 IST is the same-day fallback.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit requires the source-level licence fields and release assessment recorded by the scraper.

sources.overlap_strategy: Read the visible recent table and merge source dates; manual date inputs support recovery.
sources.schedule_rationale: 10:20 JST runs after the expected daily update while the approximately 30-day recent table supplies recovery margin.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit requires the recorded Japanese open-data source and attribution terms.

sources.overlap_strategy: Archive timestamped raw API responses and idempotently merge each local observation date.
sources.schedule_rationale: 10:00 and 22:00 Malaysia time capture morning and evening states with one-run failure tolerance.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit remains subject to the LUAS terms and recorded reuse status.

sources.overlap_strategy: Archive every dated PDF with checksum and parse by the report's printed date.
sources.schedule_rationale: Two daytime UTC runs capture a stable-URL daily PDF before it can be replaced.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit is limited by the source-specific ABHSM reuse assessment.

sources.overlap_strategy: Re-fetch today and yesterday and merge by reservoir and observation date.
sources.schedule_rationale: 09:30 and 21:30 Philippine time provide four expected attempts before a two-day row disappears.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit requires PAGASA source terms and attribution to remain recorded.

sources.overlap_strategy: Re-check the recent official weekly report range and retain downloaded reports by report date.
sources.schedule_rationale: Tuesday runs after the Monday bulletin; Wednesday repeats the capture if publication or the first workflow is delayed.
sources.licence_gate: Public commit remains subject to the recorded DWS reuse assessment.

sources.overlap_strategy: Fetch the full available five-day 15-minute window and recompute only complete local days idempotently.
sources.schedule_rationale: The non-round 05:17/17:17 winter-time and 06:17/18:17 summer-time runs leave substantial recovery margin inside the approximately five-day source window.
sources.licence_gate: AGE CC0 evidence applies to the operational open-data resource; preserve the source evidence and do not extend it to requested long archives.

sources.overlap_strategy: Fetch every currently listed bulletin, deduplicate by report date and checksum, and retry Wayback recovery separately.
sources.schedule_rationale: Twice-daily capture protects the observed approximately eight-issue rolling bulletin window.
sources.licence_gate: Reuse terms are undeclared_review; do not publish bulletin contents in the public repository until redistribution permission is resolved.

sources.overlap_strategy: Archive each accessible current per-dam snapshot by source date and merge without replacing the historical XLSX archive.
sources.schedule_rationale: Proposed morning and evening Istanbul runs; deployment waits for a stable non-protected endpoint or approved runner.
sources.licence_gate: Open-attribution evidence must be confirmed for the current endpoint before public snapshot commits.
